name: Opal Security
description: Monitor Opal Security access governance including employee access management, access reviews, role-based access controls, and employee verification for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Opal Security at https://app.opal.dev
2. Navigate to Settings > API Tokens
3. Click 'Create Token'
4. Give the token a descriptive name (e.g., 'CompAI Integration')
5. Copy the generated API token
6. Paste the token in the field below

The token needs read access to users, resources, groups, and access reviews.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Opal Security users to verify employee access management and HR IDP status tracking

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verifies that user access reviews (UARs) are configured with deadlines in Opal Security

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that resources and groups are configured in Opal Security for role-based access control

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies that HR IDP status is tracked for all users in Opal Security for employee lifecycle management
